title: Urgent Opening Teacher at NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates:
NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates!
